content:
# Session 11 (iter-011) тАФ review summary

## Metadata
- File: `AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/SectionGradedRing.lean` (fine-grained mode). Build GREEN (2439 jobs).
- SNAP sorry: **3 тЖТ 5** (NOT regression тАФ see below). Total open: 5 SNAP + 4 ╧З (QuotScheme, deferred) = 9.
- `lean_verify` SectionGradedRing axioms: `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]` (no `sorryAx`).
- Targets: comm re-signature (Step A, 4 sentences) + assoc chain (Step B, 7 sentences). 5/11 closed.

## The headline: the FALSE comm signature is eliminated
The 4-iter "close comm" churn (9тЖТ3тЖТ3тЖТ3тЖТ2тЖТ3) chased a goal that is FALSE for arbitrary `L`
(`тКХтВШ ╬У(L^{тКЧm})` = free tensor algebra on `╬У(L)`, counterexample `L=ЁЭТк┬▓`; triple-verified iter-010).
Per the planner's autonomous re-anchor decision, `sectionsMul_mul_comm` is now signed
`(L : X.Modules) [IsInvertible L]` тАФ a TRUE statement. Body kept as a typed `sorry` (no consumer;
`GCommSemiring` unbuilt тЖТ invertibility-gated future work). **No external consumer** (grep-confirmed),
so the re-sign is safe.

## Solved (2 genuine)
- **`presheafAssociator_top_apply`** (L2381) тАФ PROVEN, axiom-clean. Two attempts:
  1. element-level `((╬▒_).hom.app тКд)((aтКЧтВЬb)тКЧтВЬc) = aтКЧтВЬ(bтКЧтВЬc)` тАФ FAILED: bare
     `тКЧтВЬ[тЖС((X.sheaf.obj тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat).obj (op тКд))]` triggers eager
     `CommSemiring`/`Module` synthesis on the RingCat carrier; `CommRing` hidden behind `forgetтВВ` тЗТ
     synthesis fails. Instances are found only when an enclosing `.hom` application drives the
     expected type.
  2. **morphism-level** `(╬▒_ A B C).hom.app (op тКд) = (ModuleCat associator).hom := rfl` тАФ SUCCESS.
     Presheaf monoidal structure is objectwise тЗТ associator at any open is *definitionally* the
     `ModuleCat` associator (`PresheafOfModules.associator_hom_app`, a `@[simp] rfl`). Element-level
     reassociation recovered by consumer via `ModuleCat.MonoidalCategory.associator_hom_apply`.
- **`IsInvertible`** (L137) тАФ project-local `Prop` class, `exists_tensorInv : тИГ N, Nonempty (tensorObj L N тЙЕ unitModule X)`,
  the тКЧ-invertible Stacks-01CR PRIMARY form (mathlib-analogist `invertible`: ALIGN). Compiles.

## Scaffolded (2 honest gated sorries, +2 to count)
- **`tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible`** (L2570) тАФ `╬▓_{L,L} = ЁЭЯЩ` for invertible `L`; route
  documented (local-to-global, must NOT check at `тКд`; `Module.Invertible.tensorProductComm_eq_refl`
  + sheafification descent). Statement compiles, body `sorry`.
- **`tensorPowAdd_comm`** (L2584) тАФ gated commutativity constraint of the comparison family (did not
  previously exist). Statement compiles, body `sorry`.

## Blocked (route clear)
- **`tensorObjAssoc_hom_sectionsMul`** (L2389, pre-existing) тАФ TRUE for all `L`. `dsimp [tensorObjAssoc]; rfl`
  FAILS: `tensorObjAssoc` is canonical `╬▒_` conjugated by `tensorObjIso` bridges (iter-008), not a single
  `sheafification.mapIso`, so the one-step ╬╖-naturality (braiding template) does not transfer. Needs the
  B2/B3 whisker-unit legs + B4 `tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor` (5-segment bridge telescoping). B2/B3 NOT
  committed тАФ RHS presheaf-morphism `тКЧтВЬ` plumbing through the `forgetтВВ` instance diamond was the session
  time-sink; prover declined to commit non-compiling scaffolds.
- **`sectionsMul_mul_assoc`** (L2540, pre-existing) тАФ TRUE; needs (1) `tensorObjAssoc_hom_sectionsMul`,
  (2) ╬╝-naturality slide, (3) `tensorPowAdd_assoc` pentagon (NOT built; sketch SOUND тАФ same-permutation
  coherence, unlike comm's hexagon). Mirrors `sectionsMul_mul_one` with pentagon for triangle.

## Why 3тЖТ5 is not a regression
+2 = honest gated scaffolds (`tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible`, `tensorPowAdd_comm`) added for
blueprint coverage of the now-correct invertibility route; both producer-only, no consumer. The single
*false* signature was simultaneously eliminated. Net soundness improved.

## Verification (both highly-recommended subagents dispatched тАФ prover-touched file)
- **lean-auditor** `iter011`: 0 must-fix. `presheafAssociator_top_apply` genuine `rfl`, axiom-clean;
  5 sorry bodies honest + producer-only; `[IsInvertible L]` re-sign mathematically correct. 7 "major" =
  2 stale `DEFERRED` comment blocks (`relTensorActL/R/Proj` ~L700; `tensorPowAdd` ~L869, both implemented)
  + 5 `show`-changing-goal style instances (cosmetic). 3 minor (1 superseded block, 1 missing
  `maxHeartbeats` rationale, 38 long lines). Report: `task_results/lean-auditor-iter011.md`.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker** `iter011`: 0 must-fix. PASS on comm chain (all invertibility-gated, no
  false `\lean{}` signature), `presheafAssociator_top_apply` (morphismтЖФelement equivalent, prose not
  stale), coverage (all 4 new decls have correct `\lean{}` targets), sorry tracking. 1 major:
  `def:isInvertible` prose (~tex L263) falsely says "we take the trivializing-cover form" while Lean uses
  тКЧ-invertible тАФ blueprint-side fix. Report: `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-iter011.md`.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`, `def:isInvertible`: added `% NOTE:` flagging the trivializing-cover тЖФ
  тКЧ-invertible prose mismatch (Lean uses тКЧ-invertible; blueprint prose stale). Non-blocking; for
  blueprint-writer next iter.
- No `\leanok` overrides (sync ran iter 11, sha 97e70c5, +5 markers тАФ verified correct: 5 sorried
  decls have no proof-block `\leanok`).

## Notes (LOW)
- `sync_leanok` state: iter 11, sha 97e70c5, +5 / -0, chapter `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`. Correct.
- Blueprint-doctor findings are all in DEFERRED chapters (Cohomology_FlatBaseChange covers 2 nonexistent
  files + 13 broken refs; Picard_GlueDescent 4; Picard_QuotScheme 13) тАФ out-of-cone extraction
  artifacts, byte-identical-to-parent, resolve at merge. Active `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex` clean.
